name: com.usdgameready
description: Custom USD importer graph nodes for game-ready setup: auto-attach NavMeshAgent, CharacterController, Collider, Rigidbody, AudioSource, and Interactable components based on USD custom attributes and UsdPhysics schema.

samples.description: gameReady:* attribute 및 UsdPhysics 스키마로 NPC, Player, Collider, Rigidbody, Trigger, AudioSource, Interactable을 데모하는 기본 레벨 샘플.
